headline: Building S swell but onshore today — the good stuff lands midweek.
today: Swell's on the way up, 1-3ft this morning, but SSE wind is onshore early and swings to SE cross-on and stronger by afternoon. Morning before the wind piles on is your least-junky bet on a shortboard. Not a day to rearrange plans for.

daysToWatch.note: Big — 4-6ft-plus at 6-7s from a good S angle. Downside is SSW cross-on all day, so it'll be sizable and a touch bumpy. Fun for confident surfers.
The day to circle. Head-high 3.7-5ft at good angle with N offshore at dawn going cross-off morning. Clean and solid — shortboard, get there early before the SE swings onshore.
Prime SSE angle, chest-high at 6s, with NNW offshore and light morning wind. Excellent clean window before afternoon onshore.
Smaller but prime SE angle at 6-7s with N offshore at dawn. Worth a morning log or fish before the S onshore comes up.
